scripts.dev: sh -c './backend/gradlew -p backend bootRun & backend_pid=$!; npm --prefix frontend run dev; status=$?; kill $backend_pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $backend_pid 2>/dev/null || true; exit $status'
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && ./backend/gradlew -p backend bootJar -x test
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend run test -- --run && ./backend/gradlew -p backend test
